assertionResults.title: Status indicators are 6x6 squares
assertionResults.reason: Observed status indicators are not consistently 6x6 and color mapping does not match spec (e.g., idle marker 10x10 with warn color; dashboard indicators include #ef4444/#f97316/#eab308/#3b82f6).

assertionResults.title: Typography scale correct
assertionResults.reason: Only 4 section-label candidates matched 9-10px + 1px tracking; expected evidence target of 5+ labels was not met, and many uppercase labels are outside the required scale/spacing.

assertionResults.title: No hover background-color changes
assertionResults.reason: Hover changed background color on interactive elements (e.g., Dashboard nav link and issue row link changed from transparent to accent color).

assertionResults.title: Status uses squares only, no SVG icons or emoji
assertionResults.reason: Status marker markup in agent rows uses a rounded-full status element sized 10x10 (not 6x6), so the full requirement was not met even though no emoji/img was found in inspected status rows.

assertionResults.title: Buttons transparent with 1px border
assertionResults.reason: Audited button instances are inconsistent with the primitive spec: multiple buttons have 0px border or 2px dashed border, and several use non-11px/non-uppercase styles.

assertionResults.title: Inputs transparent with 1px border
assertionResults.reason: Input has transparent background, 1px border, no radius, and appearance none, but font size is 14px instead of required 11px.

assertionResults.title: Tabs active state correct
assertionResults.reason: Agent page tabs show inactive muted color and active foreground color with a 1px active underline pseudo-element; tabs are monospace 11px and border-radius is 0px.

frictions.description: agent-browser get html with @ref failed (selector parsing); switched to eval-based DOM extraction for row markup evidence.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval scripts to capture outerHTML snippets and computed styles.

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests command returned no captured entries for this session.
frictions.resolution: Recorded style assertions with screenshots + computed-style audits; network evidence marked N/A.

summary: Validated 7 assigned GUI assertions via read-only browser checks: 1 passed (VAL-GUI-PRIM-003) and 6 failed (VAL-GUI-FOUND-004/005/008/011, VAL-GUI-PRIM-001/002).
